caption: The video begins with a static image featuring the logo of "Kanal13AZ" prominently displayed in the center against a plain white background. The logo consists of a red circle with the number "13" and the word "kanal" written inside it. Below the logo, the text "Kanal13AZ" is clearly visible. At the bottom of the screen, there is a red button with the YouTube play icon and the text "abunə ol," which translates to "subscribe" in Azerbaijani. As the video progresses, the color of the subscribe button changes from pink to red, indicating an interactive element that viewers can click to subscribe to the channel. The overall design is simple and clean, focusing on encouraging viewers to subscribe to Kanal13AZ.
